'''chasava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycoheterotroph|mycoheterotroph]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-s-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycoheterotroph|mycoheterotroph]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chasava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæsævæth|chæsævæth]] || [[word:chæsævæj|chæsævæj]] || [[word:chæsævæsh|chæsævæsh]] || [[word:chæsævæ|chæsævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chasasavath|chasasavath]] || [[word:chasasavaj|chasasavaj]] || [[word:chasasavash|chasasavash]] || [[word:chasasava|chasasava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chasavath|chasavath]] || [[word:chasavaj|chasavaj]] || [[word:chasavash|chasavash]] || [[word:chasava|chasava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chasafvath|chasafvath]] || [[word:chasafvaj|chasafvaj]] || [[word:chasafvash|chasafvash]] || [[word:chasafvaf|chasafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chasavatha|chasavatha]] || [[word:chasavaja|chasavaja]] || [[word:chasavasha|chasavasha]] || [[word:chasavaka|chasavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chasavath|chasavath]] || [[word:chasavaj|chasavaj]] || [[word:chasavash|chasavash]] || [[word:chasava|chasava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chasavathal|chasavathal]] || [[word:chasavajal|chasavajal]] || [[word:chasavashal|chasavashal]] || [[word:chasavakal|chasavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chasavathatha|chasavathatha]] || [[word:chasavajaja|chasavajaja]] || [[word:chasavashasha|chasavashasha]] || [[word:chasavaka|chasavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chasavathan|chasavathan]] || [[word:chasavajan|chasavajan]] || [[word:chasavashan|chasavashan]] || [[word:chasavakan|chasavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chasavathaoro|chasavathaoro]] || [[word:chasavajaoro|chasavajaoro]] || [[word:chasavashaoro|chasavashaoro]] || [[word:chasavakaoro|chasavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
